testcase.name: launchBrowser

failure.message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.115) Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [71ef3966c0eae1b594b6d2708e02562e, maximizeCurrentWindow {}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.115, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.155 (07b52360cc1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Santosh\AppData\Lo...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:63213}, goog:processID: 17044, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:63213/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.115, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 71ef3966c0eae1b594b6d2708e02562e
